description: Loads the project wiki schema at session start; suggests capturing session knowledge before stopping.

hooks.prompt: A project wiki is active in this session (wiki/ directory exists). Before stopping, review the conversation and check: were any decisions made, implementation patterns established, gotchas discovered, or domain knowledge clarified that isn't already in the wiki? If yes, output a systemMessage suggesting the user run the capture skill ('ask the wiki-agent to capture this session') before closing. Keep the suggestion to one sentence. If nothing wiki-worthy happened, approve the stop silently without any message.
